snapshot.nutrition: Normal, no flags. Ate lunch at 12, trained at 5.
snapshot.notes: Period day 3-4, flow settling back to medium.

readiness.reasoning: HRV -1.1 SD (MODERATE), RHR -2 (HIGH), sleep ok, energy ok. Everything middle of the road.

actual_exercises.name: Shoulder Press (machine)
actual_exercises.notes: Left arm asymmetry again — 2nd occurrence. Failed at 7 on sets 2-3. Switching to DB press next session. Also accidentally started on chest press at 35lb before realizing.

actual_exercises.name: Seated Row
actual_exercises.notes: PROGRESSED from 60 to 65. Set 1 at 60 easy, bumped. Struggled on set 2, dropped at 8 on set 3. Lock in 65.

actual_exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
actual_exercises.notes: Coasted through. Hold — grip still the limiter.

actual_exercises.name: Goblet Squat
actual_exercises.notes: Easy all 3 sets on a MODERATE day. Bump to 35 next lower session.

actual_exercises.name: Overhead Tricep Extension (cable)
actual_exercises.notes: Supersetted with goblet squat. 17.5 too aggressive — steep drop-off. Try 15 lb next session.

actual_exercises.name: Core Block
actual_exercises.notes: 3 full rounds, pushed through after superset fatigue.

flags: Shoulder press L/R asymmetry — 2nd occurrence. Switching to DB press next upper session.
Tricep extension 12.5→17.5 too big a jump. Try 15 next session.
Goblet squat 30lb easy 3x12 on MODERATE day — bump to 35.
notes: Full body with bf. Seated row progressed 60→65. Goblet squat ready for 35. Shoulder press needs to switch to DB. Ate before training — no nausea. Good energy after.
